Building Community in Atlanta, GA
Welcome to Atlanta’s Beloved Shopping District, Toco Hills.
Nestled at the intersection of North Druid Hills and LaVista Roads, the iconic totem sign stands as a beacon, welcoming visitors and residents alike. Anchored by Publix, Toco Hills seamlessly blends convenience and discovery with a curated mix of local and national retail brands, health and wellness offerings and everyday services.
Home of Some of the Best Atlanta Restaurants
This community retail center is also home to chef-driven restaurants, whether you’re in the mood for a quick bite or a celebratory meal.
Visit our Community Centered Green Space
At Toco's heart is an outdoor green space where family and friends naturally gather.

--- Page: /about-edens ---
EDENS Enriches Communities - Mixed Use Retail Properties
Arrow
noun_787902
About EDENS
We are EDENS and We Enrich Community
Our purpose
Enrich Community
Established in 1966, EDENS’ purpose is to
enrich community
through human engagement. We are the owner, developer and steward of a nationally leading portfolio of more than 100 open-air retail and mixed-use places in high-growth markets coast to coast.
We design our places to achieve 3.5 trips per week and 5 hours of dwell time, reaching over 15 million people daily. We know that when people come together, they feel a part of something bigger than themselves and prosperity follows – economically, socially, culturally and soulfully.
Our work is bigger than real estate;
we are in the business of humanity.
Our Values
If we don’t stand for something, we will fall for anything
Innovation
Where creativity meets impact.
Connectivity
Creating meaningful bonds.
Passion
Vigorous spirit and compelling energy.
Stewardship
Thoughtful care of our assets and resources.
Execution
Empowering ideas to drive results.
Integrity
A commitment to excellence in all we do.
Intellect
Harnessing keen judgment and insight.
Entrepreneurship
Creating prosperity by taking risks.
Our promise
Create prosperity through culture, canvas and conversation
Our people create our unique story that defines our
culture
. Our places are the
canvas
for meaningful experiences. W
e celebrate
the art of
conversation
through evocative words and captivating images.
History
Enriching communities for 60 years
From a small family-owned business in South Carolina, to the nationally recognized industry leader we are today, EDENS has a rich history that spans 60 years.
Our founder, Joe Edens, created the company in 1966 on the foundation of entrepreneurialism, human connection and exceptional service. Rooted in community, our history is far more than the places we have built; ours is a story of the diverse people, neighborhoods, partnerships and places we have served. We understand that when we come together as community, we connect and form bonds – with each other and neighbors – creating meaningful stories that are passed on from generation to generation. Our eight values are reflective of this human ideal and they continue to live through our culture today.
A Produce Stand on Assembly Street, 1931
“My father and his brother started a produce stand in 1931 on Assembly Street, and all the equipment they had was a pair of 10-pound hanging scales to weigh the items.”
JOE EDENS, JR.
Founder

meta.meta_description: Discover Toco Hills, an iconic Atlanta shopping center, featuring a curated mix of local and national retailers located in the North Druid Hills Atlanta area.
